column1: I have got a ticket. I _______________ watch the film.
When I grow up, I _______________ the guitar.

"We are moving house tomorrow." 

"Really? ________________ you with the furniture."

"Do you need this pencil?"

"Yes. ____________ it to me, please?"

"What do you want to be when you grow up, Stevie?"

"____________ a scientist. That's what I want to do, anyway."

"John is a better player than Martin, isn't he?"

"Oh, yes. ____________ the match tomorrow, I think."
"The weather is terrible. It's cloudy and windy. I think, _________________"
